enableActionButtons

  • enableActionButtons(playAllowed: boolean, discardAllowed: boolean): void

  • Desc

    Enables/disables Play Hand and Discard buttons based on allowed states.

    Parameters

    • playAllowed: boolean

      If Play Hand is allowed.

    • discardAllowed: boolean

      If Discard is allowed.

    Returns void

  • registerEventListeners(onCardClick: ((index: number) => void), onPlayHand: (() => void), onDiscard: (() => void), onSort: (() => void)): void

  • Desc

    Binds user actions to the provided controller callbacks.
